resolved_issues.evidence: Core core_full_g_m_chunk and UI ui_full_pytest_chunk summaries contained 1 skipped test, while the report initially said Deferred Or Skipped: None.
resolved_issues.impact: Could be misread as no skipped test existed, weakening the no-skipped-as-passed release evidence rule.
resolved_issues.recommended_fix: Record skipped tests separately from skipped chunks and keep chunk status tied to command exit code.
resolved_issues.fix_evidence: Both reports now include skipped_tests for tests/test_live_provider_smoke.py::test_live_provider_smoke_entrypoint_is_explicitly_opt_in with reason HEITANG_RUN_LIVE_TESTS=1.

evidence.core_chunked_full_gate: 8/8 chunks passed with log and exit code sidecars
evidence.ui_chunked_full_gate: 6/6 chunks passed with log and exit code sidecars
evidence.external_registry: needs_verification=0; no ready/executable/real_local_passed flags found in Core registry review
evidence.ui_external_registry: no executable_action=true or ready/executable flags found in UI asset review
evidence.tag_boundary: Core HEAD points at existing v4.1.0; UI HEAD has no tag; no v4.1.1 tag created
evidence.workspace_path_boundary: Current v4.1.1 validation reports do not reference C legacy paths; old tracked v4.1.0 UI log remains historical evidence only
